name: socialpulse
description: SocialPulse v0.1 — execution accountability cockpit (root scripts only; app code lives in backend/ and frontend/)

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && npm run migrate && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
